evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch65/ in this worktree.

Candidate day/dusk/night renders were read from pipeline/iconforge/out/standard_repair_batch57/renders and OpenCPN references from pipeline/iconforge/out/opencpn_s52_reference plus source_variant_matrix.

Each verdict used asset id, name, semantic_brief including required pillar shape/colours/pattern, s57_structure, reference_providers, before/after SVG/render paths, chart1_parity_gate, required_change, and source-table row metadata.
OpenCPN is the available provider witness for these rows in standard_source_table; Chart No.1 crop evidence is recorded as chart1_crop:<chart1_crop_id> plus crop path.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
